text.title: MCP Server Catalog Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the report artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

example.code: { "catalog_version": "1.4.0", "refreshed_at": "2026-05-22", "reviewer": "ops-team@faion.net", "servers": [ { "name": "github-mcp", "category": "dev", "install": "claude mcp add github -s user -e GITHUB_TOKEN=... -- npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-github", "env_vars": [ "GITHUB_TOKEN" ], "tool_count": 18, "last_release": "2026-05-12", "security_score": 3, "recommendation": "use" }, { "name": "abandoned-crm-mcp", "category": "comms", "install": "...", "env_vars": [ "X" ], "tool_count": 12, "last_release": "2025-08-01", "security_score": 1, "recommendation": "avoid" } ] }

example.note: Missing catalog_version, refreshed_at, reviewer; empty servers list.
